sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in available sources

special_mechanics.name: Head Throw
special_mechanics.description: Headdy can throw his detachable head in any direction to attack enemies and interact with the environment

special_mechanics.name: Head Grab/Hook Swing
special_mechanics.description: Headdy's head can grab hooks and pull himself up to other platforms

special_mechanics.name: Pit Bounce Recovery
special_mechanics.description: Unlike typical platformers, falling into a bottomless pit does not result in instant death; Headdy bounces back up allowing recovery, though damage is sustained

special_mechanics.name: Power-up Heads
special_mechanics.description: 17 different power-up heads alter gameplay and Headdy's abilities, ranging from increased damage (spinning fireballs), invincibility, health restoration, and speed increases

tier_notes: Tier 2 - Qualitative data only. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game designed by Treasure with emphasis on originality and technical visual effects. North American version made approximately twice as difficult as Japanese release.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Dynamite Headdy (Gameplay and Development sections)
